name: General Motors Co
summary: General Motors Company, incorporated in Delaware in 2009, designs, builds, and sells trucks, crossovers, cars, and automobile parts, and provides software-enabled services and subscriptions worldwide. It operates under the Buick, Cadillac, Chevrolet, and GMC brands through its GMNA and GMI segments. GM also provides automotive financing through GM Financial and holds equity stakes in Chinese entities marketing Baojun, Buick, Cadillac, Chevrolet, and Wuling branded vehicles.
